message:
fix(packs/system/disk): close safe-pattern bypass on btrfs/dmsetup subcommands in names

btrfs and dmsetup safe patterns for `subvolume list`, `subvolume show`,
`filesystem df`, `device stats`, `property get/list`, `scrub status`,
`dmsetup ls/status/info/table/deps` all used trailing `\b`. A subvolume
or device name containing the safe subcommand keyword could short-circuit
destructive btrfs/dmsetup ops:

  btrfs subvolume delete list-snapshots-dir    -> matched btrfs-subvolume-list
  btrfs device remove stats-partition          -> matched btrfs-device-stats
  dmsetup remove status-device-mapper          -> matched dmsetup-status

Changed trailing `\b` to `(?=\s|$)` on 13 btrfs/dmsetup safe subcommands.
